name: Tim Hortons Inc.
description: Tim Hortons Inc. is a prominent Canadian multinational coffeehouse and restaurant chain, founded in 1964 in Hamilton, Ontario. Renowned as Canada's favorite coffee shop, the company specializes in serving premium brewed coffee, freshly baked donuts, sandwiches, and a variety of breakfast items. With thousands of locations across Canada, the United States, and international markets, Tim Hortons has become a cultural icon. It operates as a subsidiary of Restaurant Brands International, maintaining its headquarters in Toronto while continuing to provide quick-service dining experiences to millions of customers daily.
